Consolidated Weekly Report - Blueprint Building Group
Date: 2026-05-08
Reporting Period: 2026-05-04 → 2026-05-08

1. Summary
This week's progress across all active sites, with three CEO actions pending.

2. Project Status
- Pearl de Flore (SM San Lazaro): 90%. Awaiting textured paint cure and signage ingress.
- Fixifoot Grand Westside: 90%. FMG smoke detector contractor unresponsive (risk: delay).
- Icon 18H (BGC): Electrical plan revision ongoing.
- 4-Storey Pampanga: Genset supplier proposals under review.
- Bohol — Panglao Prime Villas: Pre-construction, land prep ongoing.
- Tresor Rare Manila Bay: Mall fit-out, pre-construction phase.

3. Procurement
- ACP for Manila Bay paid, delivery scheduled.
- Door supplier (Opatra Gensan) still unresponsive — 4-day delay.

4. CEO Action Items (URGENT)
- Approve final genset supplier selection - Deadline: 2026-05-13 - 4 STOREY blocked
- Review James tile replacement contract addendum - Deadline: 2026-05-13
- Decide on replacement outsourced designer for Opatra Gensan - Deadline: Immediate
- Approve quartz payment release after inspection confirmation - Deadline: 2026-05-13

5. Risks & Blockers
- FMG smoke detector contractor unresponsive (Fixifoot)
- Quartz inspection pending confirmation (Icon 18H)
- Outsourced designer absence (Opatra Gensan)
